title: Bridge Essay: The crisis of minimal self-awareness in schizophrenia: a meta-analytic review.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through The, crisis, of, minimal, self-awareness.

**The crisis of minimal self-awareness in schizophrenia: ameta-analytic review.** — Schizophr Res. PMID: 24055201. DOI: 10.1016/j.schres.2013.08.042. Disturbances of the minimal self, characterized by abnormal sense of the body, body ownership and agency have been proposed as the phenomenological phenotype of schizophrenia. However, self-disturbances have not been extensively investigated, in part, due to the subjective nature of such processes, and the associated difficulty of studying these phenomena using empirical methodology.
